CheckTitle: E2E Networks EFS volumes have backup enabled
Description: **E2E Networks EFS shared file systems** should have **backups** enabled so data can be recovered after failures or accidental changes.
Risk: Shared file systems without **backups** increase the risk of permanent **data loss** during failures or accidental changes.

Recommendation.Text: Enable **backups** on EFS shared file systems to allow recovery after failures or accidental changes.
